creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Another new version.  This is the very last diff, as I am the
author of Munger as well as the port maintainer, and Munger is
now finished.  I am moving on to other projects.  Only bug
fixes will generate new releases from now on.

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Tue May  1 19:17:56 2007
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Wed May 23 23:43:53 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.129
+PORTVERSION=	4.132
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Tue May  1 19:17:56 2007
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Thu May 24 12:51:35 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.129.tar.gz) = 3b36a8bfc0465e2dea4c913384a6f042
-SHA256 (munger-4.129.tar.gz) = 
deff827321c25af5a5cee906d65c63ba3a84254f385a97e8f763dcf6109f7d28
-SIZE (munger-4.129.tar.gz) = 305478
+MD5 (munger-4.132.tar.gz) = fc31a2b49cdf2b9f7f429845213bb82c
+SHA256 (munger-4.132.tar.gz) = 
ddb5aedb537c10e017b759cfb326b480805c93503c53a0a7fe3ac70cc66ea40d
+SIZE (munger-4.132.tar.gz) = 316117
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-message ./munger/pkg-message
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-message	Wed Jan 12 18:10:14 2005
+++ ./munger/pkg-message	Sat May 19 16:06:51 2007
@@ -4,4 +4,12 @@
  *    install and configfure mod_fastcgi from                     *
  *    ${PORTSDIR}/www/mod_fastcgi                                 *
  *                                                                *
+*    Note that mod_fastcgi 2.4.2 DOES NOT work with Apache-2.2   *
+*    IT DOES work with apache 2.0                                *
+*                                                                *
+*    Note that you cannot use Munger to write FastCGI scripts    *
+*    for webservers that do not act, or have a module which      *
+*    acts as the FastCGI server.  Munger is only linked against  *
+*    the client library.                                         *
+*                                                                *
  ******************************************************************
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Tue May  1 19:17:56 2007
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist	Wed May 23 23:43:57 2007
@@ -1,7 +1,8 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.22
+lib/libmunger.so.25
  %%DKNS_BIN%%
  %%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
+%%DATADIR%%/httpd.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/ip2country.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/echo.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/msh.munger
